name: drydry
description: Find and converge parallel paths in any artefact: code, prose, design systems. Methodology guide that disciplines how a duplication audit runs (Type-4 clone framing, verifier-burden LLM pass, allow-list scoping, drift hypothesis, triage, two-fates discipline, contrarian second-pass, method-as-artefact) without prescribing what duplication looks like in your codebase. One orchestrator (drydry:drydry) with quick and audit modes; the calling session formulates the audit checklist from the codebase in front of it. Agent-only sub-skills handle sweep, checklist seeds, triage, research, upstream/framework checks, and instruction-file audits.
